question: A hummingbird would be unable to survive in which location? (A) tropical rainforest (B) temperate garden (C) Antarctica (D) mountain meadow
facts: Hummingbirds feed primarily on nectar from flowers.
Antarctica has no native flowering plants due to its extreme cold.
Hummingbirds have the highest metabolic rate among birds.
Antarctica is the coldest continent on Earth.

steps.text: Hummingbirds require nectar from flowers as their primary food source.
Antarctica has no flowering plants that could provide nectar.
Without nectar, hummingbirds would have no viable food source in Antarctica.
Hummingbirds also cannot regulate body temperature below -40C due to their small mass.
Therefore, a hummingbird cannot survive in Antarctica.

answer_text: Therefore, a hummingbird cannot survive in Antarctica.
